answer_format: Step-by-step chain description, then ANSWER: <final outcome>. Position of domino_2: POSITION: [x, y]
expected_outcome: All 3 dominos topple sequentially from left to right. The last domino falls into the bucket zone.

ground_truth.outcome: domino_0 at rest at (1.5, 0.4); domino_1 at rest at (2.0, 0.4); domino_2 at rest at (2.7, 0.4); trigger_ball at rest at (1.0, 0.1)

question: Describe step by step what happens in this chain reaction, then predict the final state.
answer_format: Step-by-step chain description, then ANSWER: <final outcome>. Position of final_ball: POSITION: [x, y]
expected_outcome: Ball rolls down ramp, hits block on shelf. Block slides off and falls onto second ramp, slides down and topples a chain of 5 small blocks. Last block knocks the final ball into the bucket.

ground_truth.outcome: ball_1 moving at (11.6, 0.1); block_1 moving at (18.0, -6.0); block_chain_0 moving at (14.5, -0.7); block_chain_1 moving at (15.9, -3.1); block_chain_2 at rest at (10.9, 0.1); block_chain_3 moving at (16.5, -4.5); block_chain_4 moving at (17.0, -6.2); final_ball moving at (17.6, -8.0)
